column1: It is/is not healthy to have pets and other animals within our own living space.
The management of pigs is known as piggery/poultry.
Cows/Pigs have very small alimentarey canal.
Hen cackles, has a short tail with dull feathers, possesses shorter/larger comb and wattles and is timid in nature.
Main food of cows/pigs is potatoes.
